data.content:
Revised implementation plan:
1. Update `src/components/lease-audit-helpers.ts` so `buildLeaderboard` applies a single qualification rule per step before ranking: keep only agent rows with at least 10 completed attempts and success rate strictly greater than 25%.
2. Compute every leaderboard-visible field from the qualified set only, not the full step stats. That includes the ranked winner/runner-up list, the per-step mean used for `margin`, and `totalN`, so excluded low-signal agents cannot still influence displayed output.
3. Preserve existing ordering/tie-break behavior among qualified entries: sort by success rate descending, then completed-attempt count descending.
4. Skip a step entirely when no qualified agents remain after filtering.
5. Extend `src/components/__tests__/lease-audit-view-helpers.test.ts` with regression coverage for: a mixed-step case where an excluded low-signal agent would otherwise skew `margin` and `totalN`; exclusion of entries with fewer than 10 attempts; exclusion of entries with success rate at or below 25%; and omission of the step when all agents are filtered out.
6. Validation for implementation should run the focused lease-audit helper test file first, then the broader repo quality gates if the workflow later authorizes implementation.
